topic: writing and graphing linear equations from word problems
latex:
A makeup box subscription costs \$16 per month for 5 samples each month. Each additional sample costs \$2.

\textbf{a.} Write and graph an equation in two variables that represents the monthly cost of your subscription, including additional samples.

\textbf{b.} Identify the independent and dependent variables.

\textbf{c.} How much does it cost to order 7 samples in one month's box?
